events.title: The Wizard of Oz — Spring Musical (Friday Evening Performance)
events.location: Woodside High Auditorium, 150 Education Drive, Woodside, CA 94062
events.description:
Woodside High School Drama Department presents THE WIZARD OF OZ — Spring Musical.
Date & Time: Friday, April 3, 2026 at 7:00 PM
Location: Woodside High Auditorium, 150 Education Drive, Woodside, CA 94062
Tickets: Adults $15; Students/Seniors $10; Children under 5 free. Purchase online: woodsidedrama.org/tickets or at the door (cash/card accepted).
Doors open 30 minutes before showtime. Concessions available at intermission.
Presented by Mr. Roberts, Drama Department Director.
